text_block_list.text:
It's a yearly grand event where Umamusume of
the classic and senior years compete for the
time-honored Autumn Shield.

But for the racers, the honor of winning such a
race goes beyond simply obtaining the trophy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It looks like it's about time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm off to the paddock. Why don't you head to
the staff seating?
choice_data_list: I think I'll watch from the paddock.
I think I'll watch from the paddock.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then make sure you stand tall and with
purpose.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That way you'll be easy to spot from the
paddock.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, I see some familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, there aren't many races I could call this
interesting.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation looks set and ready to
go! Which one of them will win this year's shield?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Whoever wins the shield will be the star of this
generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please. Your intent to win has been oozing
through that easy-going facade of yours.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, I guess we're all here to win, aren't
we?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I want to beat everyone too. No—I will beat everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well then, you better not hold back. I want to see
you both run at your best.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Show me what you two are made of!
